title: Chroma Bit
description: Ce style reproduit le pixel art rétro 8 bits et 16 bits classique, caractérisé par une palette de couleurs indexées stricte et limitée, sans aucun anticrénelage. Il présente des bords durs et en escalier, des bandes de couleurs plates distinctes pour l'éclairage, et un tramage en damier classique pour créer de la texture, évoquant l'esthétique des jeux d'arcade vintage.
description_en: This style replicates classic 8-bit and 16-bit retro pixel art characterized by a strict, limited indexed color palette and an absolute absence of anti-aliasing. It features hard, jagged aliased edges, distinct flat-shaded color banding for illumination, and classic checkerboard dithering to create texture and mid-tones, evoking vintage arcade and indie game aesthetics.
description_fr: Ce style reproduit le pixel art rétro 8 bits et 16 bits classique, caractérisé par une palette de couleurs indexées stricte et limitée, sans aucun anticrénelage. Il présente des bords durs et en escalier, des bandes de couleurs plates distinctes pour l'éclairage, et un tramage en damier classique pour créer de la texture, évoquant l'esthétique des jeux d'arcade vintage.
prompt: Authentic 16-bit retro pixel art rendering, utilizing a strict, limited indexed color palette and absolute zero anti-aliasing. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. Lighting is executed through crisp, graphical cell-shading with distinct, unblended bands of highlight, midtone, and deep shadow. The color harmony relies on {{primary_color}} as the foundational dominant hue, punctuated by {{accent_color}} for stark, punchy highlights or deep contrasting elements, while {{secondary_color}} fills in supporting environmental details. Gradients are strictly forbidden; all color transitions must be achieved through flat color blocking or classic checkerboard pixel dithering patterns to simulate texture and mid-tones. Line work consists of hard, jagged staircase pixel edges, with heavy, aliased dark pixel outlines used selectively to define structural contours and anchor the deepest shadows. The overall aesthetic is distinctly digital, blocky, and nostalgic, perfectly emulating vintage 1990s arcade or indie game graphics. Every element must be constructed from distinct, visible square pixels, maintaining a uniform low-resolution grid structure across the entire composition without any high-resolution blending or smooth vector curves, 8-bit color depth simulation, classic gaming aesthetic, pixelated contours, flat graphic rendering, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
prompt_removebg: Authentic 16-bit retro pixel art rendering, utilizing a strict, limited indexed color palette and absolute zero anti-aliasing. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The entire composition is composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. Lighting is executed through crisp, graphical cell-shading with distinct, unblended bands of highlight, midtone, and deep shadow. The color harmony relies on {{primary_color}} as the foundational dominant hue, punctuated by {{accent_color}} for stark, punchy highlights or deep contrasting elements, while {{secondary_color}} fills in supporting environmental details. Gradients are strictly forbidden; all color transitions must be achieved through flat color blocking or classic checkerboard pixel dithering patterns to simulate texture and mid-tones. Line work consists of hard, jagged staircase pixel edges, with heavy, aliased dark pixel outlines used selectively to define structural contours and anchor the deepest shadows. The overall aesthetic is distinctly digital, blocky, and nostalgic, perfectly emulating vintage 1990s arcade or indie game graphics. Every element must be constructed from distinct, visible square pixels, maintaining a uniform low-resolution grid structure across the entire composition without any high-resolution blending or smooth vector curves. The subject's jagged, aliased pixel edges interact directly with the flat {{background_color}} backdrop, explicitly allowing intentional overflow where parts of the scene can extend beyond the visible frame, 8-bit color depth simulation, classic gaming aesthetic, pixelated contours, flat graphic rendering
background_prompt: A pure background environment rendered in authentic 16-bit retro pixel art, featuring a sprawling, nostalgic digital landscape. The scene is constructed entirely of distinct, aliased square pixels with zero anti-aliasing. Large flat blocks of {{primary_color}} establish the atmospheric depth, layered with crisp, unblended bands of {{secondary_color}} shadows and {{accent_color}} highlights. Occasional checkerboard pixel dithering creates subtle textures across the terrain and sky. No foreground subjects, just a continuous low-resolution graphical environment.
background_prompt_removebg: A pure background environment rendered in authentic 16-bit retro pixel art, featuring a sprawling, nostalgic digital landscape constructed from distinct, aliased square pixels with zero anti-aliasing. Large flat blocks of {{primary_color}} establish atmospheric depth, layered with crisp, unblended bands of {{secondary_color}} shadows and {{accent_color}} highlights. Occasional checkerboard pixel dithering creates subtle textures. The scene is framed by a decorative foreground pixel-art border overlay, featuring jagged, stair-stepped geometric framing elements that create depth. Both the landscape and the decorative pixel frame transition cleanly into a flat {{background_color}} surface, leaving the central invisible subject area ready for compositing.
